---
title: "PCI 導絲穿越技術"
subtitle: "cath PCI wiring"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2025-11-29
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

Guidewire Crossing Techniques for Percutaneous
Coronary Intervention
閱讀翻譯: Dr. Arvin
編寫: 謝慕揚醫師, Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD, FESC
Assisted by Claude.ai
Version 1.0
2025-11-29
教學目標Teaching Objectives
• 了解不同病灶類型的導絲選擇原則
Understanding guidewire selection principles for different lesion types
• 掌握Polymer jacket 導絲的特性與應用時機
Mastering the characteristics and appropriate timing for polymer jacket guidewires
• 學習3D wiring method 的技術要點
Learning the technical key points of 3D wiring method
• 認識導絲操作的安全注意事項
Recognizing safety precautions in guidewire manipulation
Contents
前言Introduction
1.1
The Making of This Handout
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 不同病灶類型的導絲選擇
Guidewire Selection for Different Lesion Types
2.1
近端彎曲合併鈣化病灶
Proximal Tortuosity with Calcified Lesions . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.1.1
理想導絲特性Ideal Guidewire Characteristics . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.1.2
實際選用導絲Practical Guidewire Selection . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.1.3
臨床考量Clinical Considerations . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.1.4
安全策略Safety Strategy
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
2.2
開口病灶Ostial Lesions . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.2.1
理想導絲特性Ideal Guidewire Characteristics . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.2.2
實際選用導絲Practical Guidewire Selection . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.2.3
PCI 成功關鍵Keys to Successful PCI
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 2.2.4
導絲選擇原則Guidewire Selection Principles
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . Polymer Jacket 導絲
Polymer Jacket Guidewires
3.1
定義與結構Definition and Structure . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3.2
特性Characteristics
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3.2.1
優異的滑動特性Excellent Lubricity
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3.2.2
導絲尖端負荷Tip Load . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3.3
使用時機Indications for Use
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3.4
使用注意事項Precautions for Use . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 3D Wiring Method
4.1
正交方向影像Orthogonal Directions . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.1.1
各冠狀動脈分支的建議角度
Recommended Angles for Coronary Branches
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.2
實驗模型驗證Experimental Model Validation . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.2.1
實驗設計Experimental Design
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.2.2
實驗結果Experimental Results . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.3
臨床應用關鍵Key Clinical Applications . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.3.1
2D vs 3D Wiring 的適用時機
When to Use 2D vs 3D Wiring
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.3.2
3D Wiring 穿透技術要點
Key Points for 3D Wiring Penetration . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 4.3.3
穿透過程中的處理Management During Penetration
. . . . . . . . . . . 4.4
臨床實踐秘訣Clinical Practice Tips
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 總結Summary
5.1
核心要點回顧Core Points Review
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 5.2
給新進同仁的建議
Recommendations for New Practitioners . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 5.3
持續改進Continuous Improvement . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
前言Introduction
經皮冠狀動脈介入術(Percutaneous Coronary Intervention, PCI) 的成功關鍵之一在於導絲
(guidewire) 能否順利通過病灶。不同的病灶型態需要選擇適當的導絲, 並運用正確的技術才
能安全有效地完成手術。 The success of Percutaneous Coronary Intervention (PCI) critically depends on whether the
guidewire can successfully cross the lesion. Different lesion morphologies require appropriate
guidewire selection and correct techniques to safely and effectively complete the procedure. 本講義將詳細介紹導絲選擇的原則、polymer jacket 導絲的特性, 以及3D wiring method
等進階技術, 幫助臨床醫師提升PCI 的成功率與安全性。 This manual will provide detailed introduction to guidewire selection principles, character-
istics of polymer jacket guidewires, and advanced techniques such as 3D wiring method, helping
clinicians improve the success rate and safety of PCI. 1.1
The Making of This Handout
In October 2025, Dr. Hsieh attended CCT 2025 in Kobe, Japan, and brought three books
back to Taiwan. One of the books was Coronary Wiring Techniques, which Dr. Arvin, our
international fellow spent a week reading thoroughly with the assistance of Google Lens. This
handout was developed from the translations and personal notes compiled during that process. We hope you find this manual helpful and encourage you to use it as a supplementary tool
while reading the original book, which is replete with excellent illustrations. Figure 1: Dr. Arvin, first row, right one. 不同病灶類型的導絲選擇
Guidewire Selection for Different Lesion Types
2.1
近端彎曲合併鈣化病灶
Proximal Tortuosity with Calcified Lesions


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
2.1.1 理想導絲特性Ideal Guidewire Characteristics
對於近端彎曲合併鈣化的病灶, 理想的導絲應具備以下特性:
For lesions with proximal tortuosity and calcification, the ideal guidewire should possess
the following characteristics:
特性
Characteristic
中文說明
Chinese Description
English Description
操控性
Handling
能精確控制導絲尖端位置
Precise control of wire tip
position
滑順性
Smoothness
減少通過病灶時的阻力
Minimize resistance when
crossing lesions
柔軟度
Flexibility
能順應血管彎曲
Conform to vessel tortuosity
支撐力
Support
提供足夠的推送力
Provide adequate pushing
force
2.1.2 實際選用導絲Practical Guidewire Selection
製造商
Manufacturer
建議導絲型號
Recommended Wire Models
Terumo
Runthrough NS Hypercoat, Runthrough NS Fullcoat
Asahi Intecc
Fielder FC, SION, SION black, X-treme
Japan Lifeline
ATHLETE Passista, ATHLETE JOKER
Niblo
ABYSS EXCEED FF
2.1.3 臨床考量Clinical Considerations
關鍵概念Key Concepts
在鈣化病灶中, 導絲通過彎曲或鈣化區域時會遇到困難。除非鈣化病灶的狹窄非常嚴
重, 否則操作並不太困難。然而, 近端彎曲會對導絲產生極大阻力, 使得在鈣化病灶內的
操作變得困難。 In calcified lesions, the guidewire encounters diﬀiculty when crossing tortuous or cal-
cified areas. Unless the calcified lesion has very severe stenosis, the operation is not too
diﬀicult. However, proximal tortuosity creates significant resistance to the guidewire, mak-
ing manipulation within the calcified lesion challenging. 重要警告:過度施力可能導致進入false lumen 的風險!
Important Warning: Excessive force may lead to the risk of entering the false lumen!


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
2.1.4 安全策略Safety Strategy
重點提醒
最佳實踐建議Best Practice Recommendations
1. 最小coating 原則Minimal Coating Principle:
使用最少量hydrophilic coating 或polymer jacket 的導絲可防止操作壓力和不必要
的併發症
Using guidewires with minimal hydrophilic coating or polymer jacket can prevent
operational stress and unnecessary complications
2. 導絲更換策略Wire Exchange Strategy:
通過病灶後, 建議將polymer-jacketed wire 更換為coiled wire 以確保最大安全性
After crossing the lesion, it is recommended to exchange the polymer-jacketed wire
for a coiled wire to ensure maximum safety
2.2
開口病灶Ostial Lesions
2.2.1 理想導絲特性Ideal Guidewire Characteristics
處理開口病灶時, 導絲需要具備:
When dealing with ostial lesions, the guidewire needs to possess:
• 操控性Maneuverability: 能在開口處精確定位
• 柔軟度Flexibility: 避免對血管壁造成損傷
• 支撐力Support: 提供穩定的平台以利支架置放
2.2.2 實際選用導絲Practical Guidewire Selection
製造商
建議導絲型號
Terumo
Runthrough NS Extra Floppy, Runthrough NS Ultra
Floppy
Asahi Intecc
Rinato, Route, SION blue
Abbott
HI-TORQUE TRAVERSE, HI-TORQUE ELITE II
Japan Lifeline
ATHLETE Passista
2.2.3 PCI 成功關鍵Keys to Successful PCI
開口病灶處理的關鍵要素
Key Elements for Ostial Lesion Management
1. 支架位置Stent Positioning:
支架能否放置在適當位置是成功的關鍵
Whether the stent can be placed in the appropriate position is the key to success


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
2. Guide Catheter Support:
需要適當尺寸的導引導管和足夠的backup
Requires appropriately sized guide catheter and adequate backup
3. 導絲穩定性Wire Stability:
導絲的穩定性至關重要
Wire stability is of utmost importance
2.2.4 導絲選擇原則Guidewire Selection Principles
重點提醒
特殊考量Special Considerations
雖然hydrophilic coating 導絲容易通過病灶, 但放置支架時常需要將導引導管從冠狀動脈
開口移出。因此,無hydrophilic coating 的導絲較為適合。 Although hydrophilic-coated guidewires easily cross lesions, guide catheter withdrawal from
the coronary ostium is often necessary during stent placement. Therefore, non-hydrophilic
coated guidewires are more suitable. 若因遠端血管型態不得不使用強coating 導絲, 基於安全理由應在適當時機更換導絲。 If a heavily coated wire must be used due to distal vessel anatomy, it should be exchanged
at an appropriate time for safety reasons.


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
Polymer Jacket 導絲
Polymer Jacket Guidewires
3.1
定義與結構Definition and Structure
PCI 使用的導絲依結構分為金屬基底型和polymer jacket 型。Polymer 是由多個單體聚合而
成的化合物, 通常為高分子量有機化合物。以polymer sleeve 包覆金屬內芯並施加hydrophilic
coating 的產品稱為polymer jacket 導絲。 Guidewires used in PCI are classified into metal-based and polymer jacket types based on
their structure. Polymers are compounds formed by polymerization of multiple monomers,
typically high molecular weight organic compounds. Products with a polymer sleeve covering
the metal core and applied with hydrophilic coating are called polymer jacket guidewires. 3.2
特性Characteristics
3.2.1 優異的滑動特性Excellent Lubricity
核心特點Core Feature
Polymer jacket 導絲最重要的特點是其滑順性(lubricity)。 The most important feature of polymer jacket guidewires is their lubricity. 優點Advantages:
• 能夠滑入金屬導絲無法到達的病灶
Can slide into lesions unreachable by metallic wires
缺點Disadvantages:
• 會減弱觸感, 較難傳達血管和病灶的特性
Reduces tactile feedback, making it harder to convey vessel and lesion characteristics
3.2.2 導絲尖端負荷Tip Load
重點提醒
Tip Load 的定義Definition of Tip Load
此處的tip load 不同於製造商標示的數值, 而是指導絲尖端數毫米到1 公分範圍內的硬
度。 The tip load here differs from manufacturer-specified values and refers to the stiffness within
a few millimeters to 1 cm from the wire tip. 形成原因Formation Mechanism:
因polymer 施加在柔軟金屬線圈表面, 導絲尖端意外地較硬。 Because polymer is applied to the surface of a soft metallic coil, the wire tip is unexpectedly
stiff. 評估方式Assessment Method:
最簡單的評估方式: 一手握住導絲尖端附近, 另一手手指墊感受尖端硬度。 The simplest assessment method: Hold the wire near its tip with one hand and feel the tip
stiffness with the finger pad of the other hand.


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
3.3
使用時機Indications for Use
序號
臨床情境
Clinical Scenario
理由
Rationale
鈣化狹窄病灶
Calcified stenotic lesions
因滑順性使導絲更容易通過, 金屬導絲因摩
擦力難以通過
Lubricity facilitates crossing; metallic wires
struggle due to friction
支架網眼上的側枝選擇
Side
branch
selection
through stent struts
支架網眼對導絲產生摩擦阻力,polymer
jacket 導絲更易插入側枝
Stent struts create frictional resistance; poly-
mer jacket wires enter side branches more
easily
彎曲血管
Tortuous vessels
連續之字形彎曲和高度曲率使得血管壁對
導絲摩擦阻力高
Continuous zigzag tortuosity and high cur-
vature create high frictional resistance
Reverse wire method
用於將導絲插入從主幹以鈍角分支的側枝,
或狹窄病灶後立即分支的側枝(尤其是偏心
病灶)
Used for inserting wire into side branches at
obtuse angles or immediately after stenotic
lesions
STAR 技術
STAR technique
Subintimal tracking and re-entry (STAR) 技
術涉及有意的subintimal tracking
Involves intentional subintimal tracking and
re-entry
3.4
使用注意事項Precautions for Use
重要警告Important Warnings
1. 滲入斑塊Plaque Penetration
因滑順性和局部較硬的尖端, 容易滑入脆弱斑塊。若未注意而推進至周邊, 可能造成
dissection。 Due to lubricity and locally stiff tip, it easily slides into vulnerable plaques. If advanced
peripherally without attention, it may cause dissection. 特別注意:在急性冠狀動脈症候群等不穩定、脆弱斑塊病灶需特別小心。 Special attention: Exercise particular caution in unstable, vulnerable plaque lesions
such as acute coronary syndrome. 重要警告Important Warnings (續)
2. 氣球擴張後的病灶通過Crossing Post-Balloon Dilated Lesions
病灶經氣球擴張後會產生人工dissection。導絲尖端進入dissection 腔會導致dissec-
tion 擴大。


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
Lesions create iatrogenic dissection after balloon dilation. Wire tip entry into the
dissection cavity will cause dissection extension. 3. 穿孔風險Perforation Risk
• 可無阻力穿透小的周邊血管
Can penetrate small peripheral vessels without resistance
• 因尖端較硬, 容易發生穿孔
Perforations occur easily due to stiff tip
• 必須始終注意確保尖端在正確位置
Must always ensure tip is in correct position
• 與microcatheter 併用進行CTO 穿透時, 導絲尖端也會受到強大作用力, 需謹慎操
作
When used with microcatheter for CTO crossing, wire tip experiences strong forces
requiring careful manipulation


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
3D Wiring Method
4.1
正交方向影像Orthogonal Directions
3D wiring method 的核心概念是使用兩個約90 度角的影像角度來精確導引導絲。 The core concept of 3D wiring method is using two approximately 90-degree angulated
image projections to precisely guide the guidewire. 4.1.1 各冠狀動脈分支的建議角度
Recommended Angles for Coronary Branches
分支
Branch
第一角度
First Angle
第二角度
Second Angle
左前降支LAD
Seg 5-2
LAO 45° →AP
CRA 30°
Seg 6
LAO 45°
RAO 45°
Seg 7 (proximal)
RAO 30° CRA 45°
RAO 30° CAU 45°
Seg 7 (distal)
LAO 45° CRA 45°
LAO 45° CAU 45°
Seg 8
CAU 30°
LAO 45°
Seg 9
LAO 45° CRA 30° AP
CAU CRA 30° RAO 45°
左迴旋支LCX
Seg 11
CAU 30°
RAO 45°
重點提醒
縮寫說明Abbreviations:
• LAO = Left Anterior Oblique 左前斜位
• RAO = Right Anterior Oblique 右前斜位
• CRA = Cranial 頭位
• CAU = Caudal 尾位
• AP = Anteroposterior 正位
4.2
實驗模型驗證Experimental Model Validation
4.2.1 實驗設計Experimental Design
研究團隊使用脈動模型(Pulsatile model, Terumo Corporation) 進行3D wiring 驗證:
The research team validated 3D wiring using a pulsatile model (Terumo Corporation):
• CTO 段製作: 20mm 長, 使用2-3% agarose 製作
CTO segment: 20mm long, made with 2-3% agarose
• 血管模型直徑: 約3mm
Vessel model diameter: approximately 3mm


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
• 遠端目標: 插入目標管(內徑0.4mm 或0.6mm)
Distal target: target tube insertion (inner diameter 0.4mm or 0.6mm)
• 測試部位: RCA 或LAD
Test sites: RCA or LAD
4.2.2 實驗結果Experimental Results
導絲類型
Wire Type
結果
Results
Gaia wire
能順利通過Progreat tube (內徑0.6mm)
Successfully crosses Progreat tube (0.6mm inner
diameter)
FineCross tube
(內徑0.4mm)
有時難以通過10mm tip curve 的導絲tip-body
Sometimes diﬀicult to cross 10mm tip curve wire
tip-body
Conquest Pro wires
(9g 和12g)
Tip curve <0.8mm 較有效
Tip curve <0.8mm more effective
手動製作
Manual shaping
需要0.8mm 40° tip curve, 有學習曲線
Requires 0.8mm 40° tip curve, has learning curve
4.3
臨床應用關鍵Key Clinical Applications
4.3.1 2D vs 3D Wiring 的適用時機
When to Use 2D vs 3D Wiring
位置
Location
優先方法
Priority
說明
Description
CTO 入口
CTO entry
2D > 3D
導絲位於血管腔內, 移動不穩定且難以操控。 需旋轉tip curve 尋找可插入點
Wire in vessel lumen, unstable and diﬀicult to
control. Need to rotate tip curve to find entry
point
CTO 內部
Within CTO
2D = 3D
若有landmarks 且可維持操作性, 應嘗試3D
wiring。若無進展, 可用3D 影像確定約180°
方向並擺動尖端
If landmarks present and maneuverability main-
tained, attempt 3D wiring. If no progress, use
3D imaging to confirm 180° direction
CTO 出口
CTO exit
3D > 2D
可視需要進行選擇性造影, 盡可能使用3D
wiring 達成pinpoint puncture
Perform selective contrast injection as needed,
use 3D wiring for pinpoint puncture whenever
possible


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
4.3.2 3D Wiring 穿透技術要點
Key Points for 3D Wiring Penetration
導絲推進的必要條件Prerequisites for Wire Advancement
1. 充足的Backup Support
• 6 Fr 或更大的guide catheter
6 Fr or larger guide catheter
• Corsair catheter
• 必要時使用anchor
Use anchor when necessary
2. 充足的Tip Load
• 常需要Conquest wire
Often requires Conquest wire
• 對出口處的纖維囊尤其重要
Especially important for fibrous cap at exit
• 仔細考慮尖端推進的縱向向量並進行第一次穿刺
Carefully consider longitudinal vector of tip advancement for first puncture


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
4.3.3 穿透過程中的處理Management During Penetration
重點提醒
情境一: 導管無法通過硬組織
Scenario 1: Catheter Cannot Cross Hard Tissue
1. 嘗試增加tip load
Attempt to increase tip load
2. 在3D 影像下稍微改變穿刺點
Slightly modify puncture point under 3D imaging
3. 若仍無效, 考慮替代路徑或視情況在出口處刻意旋轉尖端
If still unsuccessful, consider alternative route or deliberately rotate tip at exit
情境二: 尖端在出口處容易推進但偏離預定位置
Scenario 2: Tip Advances Easily at Exit but Deviates
懷疑導絲移入false lumen
• 從false lumen 穿刺至true lumen 幾乎不可能
Puncture from false to true lumen nearly impossible
• 可從前方重新推進導絲
May re-advance wire from antegrade approach
• 或使用IVUS guided 或retrograde approach
Or use IVUS-guided or retrograde approach
4.4
臨床實踐秘訣Clinical Practice Tips
實踐智慧Practice Wisdom
對於CTO 病灶, 應嘗試使用Gaia 和Conquest wires 的3D wiring method。然而, 實
際上會處理各種病灶,3D wiring method 不應被視為唯一推薦技術且不應固守。 For CTO lesions, attempt 3D wiring method with Gaia and Conquest wires. However,
in practice various lesions are encountered, and 3D wiring method should not be considered
the only recommended technique nor rigidly adhered to. 關鍵原則:重要的是根據情況適當地結合使用2D 和3D wiring method。 Key Principle: What is important is appropriately combining 2D and 3D wiring
methods based on the situation.


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
總結Summary
5.1
核心要點回顧Core Points Review
1. 導絲選擇應基於病灶特性
Guidewire Selection Based on Lesion Characteristics
• 近端彎曲: 選擇操控性佳的導絲
Proximal tortuosity: choose wires with good handling
• 鈣化病灶: 需要滑順性和支撐力的平衡
Calcified lesions: balance lubricity and support
• 開口病灶: 優先使用無coating 導絲
Ostial lesions: prioritize non-coated wires
2. Polymer Jacket 導絲的雙面性
Dual Nature of Polymer Jacket Wires
• 優點: 優異的滑順性, 能通過困難病灶
Advantages: excellent lubricity, crosses diﬀicult lesions
• 缺點: 穿孔和dissection 風險增加
Disadvantages: increased perforation and dissection risk
• 使用後應適時更換為安全性較高的導絲
Should be exchanged for safer wires when appropriate
3. 3D Wiring Method 的靈活應用
Flexible Application of 3D Wiring
• 在CTO 出口處特別有價值
Particularly valuable at CTO exit
• 需與2D method 靈活搭配
Requires flexible combination with 2D method
• 充足的backup 和適當的tip load 是成功關鍵
Adequate backup and appropriate tip load are keys to success
4. 安全性始終是首要考量
Safety is Always the Primary Consideration
• 避免過度施力
Avoid excessive force
• 密切監測導絲位置
Closely monitor wire position
• 必要時毫不猶豫地更換導絲
Exchange wire without hesitation when necessary


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
5.2
給新進同仁的建議
Recommendations for New Practitioners
重點提醒
學習重點Learning Focus
1. 理解原理Understand Principles:
了解每種導絲設計的物理特性和臨床意義
Understand the physical properties and clinical significance of each wire design
2. 觀察資深醫師Observe Senior Physicians:
注意他們如何根據病灶特性選擇導絲
Note how they select wires based on lesion characteristics
3. 練習基本技能Practice Basic Skills:
從簡單病灶開始, 逐步累積經驗
Start with simple lesions, gradually accumulate experience
4. 學習識別問題Learn to Identify Problems:
及早發現導絲位置異常或阻力異常
Early detection of wire position or resistance abnormalities
5. 培養系統性Develop Systematic Approach:
建立標準化的導絲選擇和操作流程
Establish standardized wire selection and manipulation protocols
6. 重視安全Prioritize Safety:
永遠把病人安全放第一位
Always put patient safety first
5.3
持續改進Continuous Improvement
• 定期回顧自己的病例
Regularly review your own cases
• 分析失敗案例, 學習改進
Analyze failed cases, learn to improve
• 參加教育訓練與討論會
Participate in educational training and conferences
• 保持對新技術的學習
Maintain learning of new techniques
• 與同事分享經驗
Share experiences with colleagues


心血管中心教學文件
PCI 導絲穿越技術
記住這三個核心原則
Remember These Three Core Principles
1. 安全第一Safety First:
永遠不要為了速度而犧牲安全
Never sacrifice safety for speed
2. 因材施教Individualized Approach:
根據病灶特性選擇最適合的導絲和技術
Select the most appropriate wire and technique based on lesion characteristics
3. 靈活應變Flexible Adaptation:
沒有單一技術適用所有情況, 需要靈活調整
No single technique fits all situations, flexible adjustment is needed
優秀的導絲操作技術需要時間和經驗累積, 但嚴格遵守安全原則, 選擇適當的導絲, 並
靈活運用2D 和3D wiring 技術, 可以確保每次操作都是安全且高品質的。 Excellent guidewire manipulation skills require time and experience accumulation, but
strict adherence to safety principles, appropriate wire selection, and flexible use of 2D and
3D wiring techniques can ensure every procedure is safe and high-quality. 本講義改編自多項文獻與臨床經驗
Adapted from multiple literature sources and clinical experience
編輯: 謝慕揚, MD, PhD, FESC
僅供教學使用, 請勿用於商業用途
For educational use only, not for commercial purposes
